column2: No evidence was available to assess equity.
Acceptability of MDA was high, despite challenges to implementation in emergency settings. More information on the evidence can be found in the systematic review (Sayre et al unpublished evidence) .

Accurate estimation of the target population, supervision of field staff, and inconsistencies in drug supply were among the challenges cited in reports of MDA use in emergency settings. More information on the evidence can be found in the systematic review (Sayre et al unpublished evidence) .
